fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code to identify this set of payment terms.

fields.name: Due Date Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula that determines how to calculate the due date, for example, when you create an invoice.

fields.name: Discount Date Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date formula if the payment terms include a possible payment discount.

fields.name: Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the invoice amount (amount including VAT is the default setting) that will constitute a possible payment discount.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies an explanation of the payment terms.

fields.name: Calc. Pmt. Disc. on Cr. Memos
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a payment discount, cash discount, cash discount date, and due date are calculated on credit memos with these payment terms.
